title: niphobolus stenophyllus
intro: Niphobolus stenophyllus, also known as Goldenseal or Indian Tutsan, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Niphobolus stenophyllus include its potential to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Niphobolus stenophyllus can be made into teas, tinctures, and creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
